name: Milo
personality: Energetic, stubborn, believes he will be the next hero even though there are no monsters left, likes running around the village with his wooden sword.
appearanceHint: Small kid carrying a wooden sword, always running around looking like he's on an adventure.
motivation: Prove he is worthy of being the next hero, find a new evil to fight to protect the village.
socialStyle: extrovert, likes challenging adults to mock sword fights whenever he can.

initialMemories.content: He has heard The Ballad of the Hero 127 times and knows every word
He carved his wooden sword himself to look just like the hero's legendary sword
He believes the dark lord will come back someday and only he can defeat him
